# Wikijs Editor

## Overview

gSage AI — Wiki.js page editor tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `wikijs_editor` | Browse, read, search, create, edit, and delete Wiki.js Markdown pages (wiki, knowledge base, wikijs). Use for any wiki or documentation operation. | `wiki:read`, `wiki:write` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** — you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "locale": "",
  "url": "",
  "writable_path": ""
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_token` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | Bearer token for the Wiki.js GraphQL API. Generate in Administration > API Access. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__API_TOKEN env var. |
| `locale` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Default Wiki.js locale for page lookups and creation (e.g. 'en', 'pt'). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__LOCALE env var. |
| `url` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Wiki.js base URL (e.g. http://wikijs:3000). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__URL env var. |
| `writable_path` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Path prefix that the tool is allowed to write to (e.g. 'gsage/'). Pages outside this prefix are read-only. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__WRITABLE_PATH env var. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__API_TOKEN` | `api_token` | `string` | — | ✓ | Bearer token for the Wiki.js GraphQL API. Generate in Administration > API Access. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__API_TOKEN env var. |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__LOCALE` | `locale` | `string` | `""` | — | Default Wiki.js locale for page lookups and creation (e.g. 'en', 'pt'). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__LOCALE env var. |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | — | Wiki.js base URL (e.g. http://wikijs:3000). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__URL env var. |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__WRITABLE_PATH` | `writable_path` | `string` | `""` | — | Path prefix that the tool is allowed to write to (e.g. 'gsage/'). Pages outside this prefix are read-only. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__WRITABLE_PATH env var. |
